sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, make_timestamptz(1667810584123456));
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = make_timestamptz(1667810584120000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS utc_time FROM test_timestamps;
DELETE FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time < make_timestamptz(1667810584000000);
